DP.053.0001:
Hello, Trainer!
This is something I found.\f
It was mixed in with a load of cargo
from another country.\f
It’s not anything that I can use,
so I think you should take it.\f
DP.053.0002:
You know how Pokémon have their
own abilities?\f
Well, the move Skill Swap exchanges
the user’s ability with that of its\r
target Pokémon.\f
How you use Skill Swap is a measure
of your expertise as a Trainer.
DP.053.0003:
Somewhere beyond the sea...\f
There are other lands populated by
Pokémon and Trainers.
